title: The Last Man on Earth
original_title: El último hombre sobre la Tierra
overview: In a comedy set during the Christmas novena of a company, Piquiña, an ugly and boastful man, tries to conquer Liliana, the woman desired by all. Convinced of his charm, he goes after her, but Liliana rejects him with a blunt phrase: she would only be with him if he were the last man on Earth.

trailers.title: TRÁILER OFICIAL - EL ÚLTIMO HOMBRE SOBRE LA TIERRA
